codeReview.summary: Real-time WebSocket orderbook/trade updates, reconnection handling, connection status UI, loading skeletons, and responsive layout polish were implemented, but not all explicit feature requirements were completed.

issues.description: The feature spec requires subscribing to 'orderbook', 'trades', and 'account:{address}', but frontend subscriptions cover only 'orderbook' here and 'trades' in the companion hook; no account-channel subscription/handler exists in web code, so account/balance real-time updates are missing.
The spec requires network errors to show a retry option, but this view does not consume `error` from realtime hooks and exposes no retry UI/action when depth/trade network fetches fail.

The spec calls for number-flow price-change animation (@number-flow/react or manual), but prices are rendered as static `toFixed` strings (same pattern in trade ticker), with no number-flow transition implementation.

summary: Review failed: major realtime polish pieces landed, but explicit requirements remain unmet (missing account:{address} subscription path, missing network-error retry UX, and missing number-flow price transitions).
